name: Baek Yoonho
title: Guild Master of the White Tiger Guild

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: White Flame Strike
basic.description: Yoonho attacks the enemy by combining his fists and feet.

core.name: White Flame Pummel
core.description: Yoonho strikes quickly with his fists and feet and then performs a powerful upward strike.

skill.name: Ferocious Spirit
skill.description: After charging towards the front, Yoonho leaps and punches upward with his fist enveloped in white flames. Yoonho then gathers his strength and strikes down.

skill.name: White Flame Gale Kick
skill.description: After wrapping white flames around his feet, Yoonho leaps to attack. After leaping, he strikes with a powerfully condensed white flame.

support.name: White Flame Storm Kick
support.description: Yoonho spins once and performs a powerful downward strike with a foot enveloped in white flames. Deals Violent Explosion damage equal to 400% of Defense and applies [Defense Decrease] (Defense -20%, 12 seconds) to the target.

qte.name: Damnation
qte.description: Yoonho moves forward quickly, performs a spinning kick, spins once, and strikes down powerfully.

ultimate.name: Truth: White Flame Strike
ultimate.description: Yoonho releases a barely-controlled torrent of power and unleashes a concentrated white flame strike towards the front. Deals Violent Explosion damage equal to 400% of Defense and applies [Defense Decrease] (Defense -20%, 12 seconds) to the target.

passive.name: White Flames
passive.description: The [White Flames] effect is applied to the last hit of all skills, excluding Basic Attacks. When [White Flames] reaches 3 stacks, it activates [Violent Explosion] (damage equal to 400% of Defense, inflicts [Defense Decrease] -20% for 12 seconds). While [White Flames] is active the target's Defense decreases by an additional 2.5% (stacks up to 2 times, infinite duration).

advancements: Increases the damage of White Flame Gale Kick by 150%.
Increases the user's Break effectiveness by 20%.
When Bottomless Pit or White Flame Gale Kick is used, applies [Unlock White Flames] (Light damage +40%, grants Super Armor, 15 seconds).
Increases the user's Critical Hit Rate by 16%.
When the user enters the stage, recovers Power Gauge by 100% and increases the damage of Violent Explosion by 400%.
